problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
